p.em: Intel Manual Quality Spec: Byte Layouts & State Transitions

div.p: L1 Data Cache Size: 32 KB | Latency: 4c Indexing: VIPT
L2 Unified Cache Size: 256KB-1MB | Latency: 12c Associativity: 16-way
L3 Shared Cache Size: 2MB-64MB | Latency: 40c Shared across all Cores

ol.li: Alignment: Critical structs must be 64B aligned.
Prefetching: Hardware prefetchers optimized for sequential access.
Pointer Chasing: Causes full RAM latency penalty per hop.
Cold Misses: First access always targets DRAM.
